title: Luscious Filipino Chicken Kaldereta
description: A low-calorie Filipino chicken stew that balances smoky depth with a hint of gooey sweetness from a touch of dulce de leche.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat and sauté diced onions until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in chicken cubes and brown them on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Pour in tomato sauce, low-fat milk, and dulce de leche, then stir to combine.
Add smoked paprika, bay leaf, salt, and pepper, whisking to evenly distribute the flavors.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, cover, and cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Add carrots and peas, continue simmering uncovered for an additional 10 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, then serve hot over steamed rice or cauliflower rice for a low-calorie option.
